services.title: Wedding Catering
services.body: Custom menus for your special day

services.title: Birthday Parties
services.body: Delicious treats and meals for all ages

faqs.q: Do you have a food hygiene rating?
faqs.a: Yes, we maintain a perfect 5/5 rating.

faqs.q: Can you cater for dietary restrictions?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We offer vegan, vegetarian and gluten-free options.

faqs.q: How far do you travel to events?
faqs.a: We cover the UK with our mobile kitchen services.
Please notify us at least 48 hours before your event for a full refund.
